metadata.title: Soba Local Government
metadata.description: Official website of Soba Local Government Area, Kaduna State, Nigeria.

slides.title: Soba – Agricultural Strength of Northern Kaduna
slides.subtitle: Soba Local Government Area is known for its farming communities and rural markets.

slides.title: Soba – Communities Driving Food Production
slides.subtitle: Farmers across Soba contribute significantly to grain production in Kaduna State.

paragraphs: Soba Local Government Area is located in the northern region of Kaduna State, Nigeria. The administrative headquarters is Maigana town.
The LGA is predominantly inhabited by Hausa and Fulani communities along with other indigenous groups.
Agriculture forms the backbone of the local economy, with crops such as maize, millet, sorghum, beans, and groundnuts widely cultivated.

chairman.name: Executive Chairman, Soba Local Government
messageParagraphs: Welcome to the official website of Soba Local Government Area. Our administration remains committed to improving infrastructure, education, and healthcare for our residents.
Soba is known for its strong agricultural base and hardworking farming communities that contribute to food production in Kaduna State.
Through transparent governance and collaboration with community leaders, we aim to promote sustainable development across the LGA.

cards.title: Maize Farming
cards.subtitle: Staple Crop
cards.description: Maize is widely cultivated across Soba communities and serves as a major staple food crop.

cards.title: Millet & Sorghum
cards.subtitle: Grain Production
cards.description: Farmers across the LGA grow millet and sorghum as key grains supporting local food security.

cards.title: Livestock Rearing
cards.subtitle: Animal Husbandry
cards.description: Livestock such as cattle, goats, sheep, and poultry are raised across rural communities in Soba.

news.subtitle: Stay informed about development projects, community programs, and government initiatives in Soba.

footer.headquarters: Headquarters: Local Government Secretariat, Maigana, Kaduna State, Nigeria.

hero.title: About Soba
hero.subtitle: Discover the culture, geography, and economy of Soba Local Government Area.

location: Neighboring LGAs: Ikara, Kubau, Zaria, and Kudan.
economy: Main Economic Activities: Farming, livestock rearing, and rural trading.
Climate: Tropical savannah climate suitable for agriculture.

geographyEconomy.title: Geography & Economy
geographyEconomy.location: Soba lies within northern Kaduna State and consists largely of rural farming communities and agricultural land.
geographyEconomy.climate: The area experiences a rainy season between May and October and a dry season from November to April.
mainActivities: Crop Farming: Maize, millet, sorghum, beans, and groundnuts.
Livestock Rearing: Cattle, goats, sheep, and poultry.
Local Markets: Agricultural trading across rural communities.
